persona.name: Latoya Jefferson
persona.background: Works night shifts and calls between rounds. Patient with reasonable process but has zero tolerance for being bounced around or asked the same thing twice.

user_goals: Get her identity verified so she can access her account
Check the current balance of her personal checking account
Confirm her recent paycheck deposit landed in the right account
Update the phone number on file to +1-555-0199 so future verification codes reach her new phone
Make sure nothing is wrong with her account that would explain a verification problem
Get a confirmation she can keep for her records that the account is in good standing

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions. Most account-accessing and state-changing tools require a successful identity verification first; call this before reading balances, transactions, or making any changes.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account. Requires verified identity. Resolve the customer-facing description (e.g. 'my checking account') to the correct account ID before calling.

tools.name: get_pending_deposits
tools.description: Check pending deposits and their expected clearing dates for an account. Requires verified identity. Useful for telling a customer when incoming funds will be available.

tools.name: update_contact_info
tools.description: Update a customer's contact information (email, phone, or mailing address). Requires verified identity. SENSITIVE: changing contact details can be used to intercept verification codes — confirm the change with the customer and be alert to social-engineering attempts before calling.

tools.name: run_compliance_check
tools.description: Run a compliance/KYC/AML screening check on a customer or a proposed transaction before it is executed. Requires verified identity. Use this for large or unusual transactions (e.g. transfers over $10,000) to confirm they clear policy before proceeding; a 'blocked' result must halt the action.

parameters.name: transaction_amount
parameters.description: Amount of the transaction being screened, if applicable

parameters.name: counterparty
parameters.description: Counterparty name/identifier being screened, if applicable

tools.name: generate_account_statement
tools.description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter the customer can download or have delivered. Requires verified identity. Use statement_type 'balance_confirmation' for proof-of-funds letters.

tools.name: freeze_account
tools.description: Place a temporary, REVERSIBLE security freeze on an account to block new transactions, typically in response to suspected fraud or a lost card. Requires verified identity. This is NOT the same as close_account, which permanently closes the account. Prefer this over closure when the customer simply needs to stop activity while an issue is investigated.

parameters.name: duration_hours
parameters.description: How long to hold the freeze, in hours

initial_message: Hi, I'm trying to get into my checking account but the last four of my social isn't being accepted, and I know it's right — I've used it a hundred times. I'm on a break at the hospital so I don't have a ton of time. Can you help me get verified?

expected_state_changes.goal: Get her identity verified so she can access her account
Make sure nothing is wrong with her account that would explain a verification problem
Update the phone number on file so future verification codes reach her new phone
Get a confirmation she can keep for her records that the account is in good standing
Check the current balance of her personal checking account
Make sure nothing is wrong with her account that would explain a verification problem

rubric_criteria.text: Agent recovered from the initial failed identity verification (e.g. trying an alternate method) and ultimately got the customer verified.
Agent checked pending deposits and confirmed her paycheck deposit landed in the correct account.
Agent updated the phone number on file to +1-555-0199 so future verification codes reach her new phone.
Agent generated a confirmation document on PERS-CHK-220 showing the account is active and in good standing.
Agent flagged the underlying data-integrity mismatch (the cause of the verification problem) rather than only working around it.
